name: so2sat-lcz42

env_axis.name: cultural-zone
env_axis.shift_mechanism: Cultural-10: 10 test cities held out from different cultural zones

facts: ~500k Sentinel-1 + Sentinel-2 patches across 42+10 cities; 17 Local Climate Zone classes; 'Cultural-10' cross-cultural-zone split.
hypotheses: Cultural-10 is a curated maximum-shift selection rather than a representative natural geographic shift.
SAR and multispectral provide complementary rather than redundant signal across the cultural shift.
intuitions: So2Sat foundation-model results likely exist for 2024-25.
A cross-comparison with BigEarthNet (overlapping Sentinel data, different geographic coverage) probably exists.
LCZ scheme extensions beyond the 17-class taxonomy likely exist.
unknowns: 'Cultural zone' is an entangled handle — urban form correlates with culture but also with climate, history, and regulation; whether Cultural-10 isolates culture from these confounders cannot be determined.
LCZ classification (Stewart-Oke) is itself a representational commitment; finer subtypes or alternative urban-form taxonomies are not accessible.
epistemic_state.boundary: Snapshot (T=0); urban form changes slowly but is not exposed temporally; patch-level only.

materialization_status: Full So2Sat-LCZ42 via HuggingFace zhu-xlab/So2Sat-LCZ42 (~17 GB). Includes Sentinel-1 SAR + Sentinel-2 MSI + LCZ labels.
